Christmas Email Promotion #1					    Copyright Free Template



Subject:  Can’t beat the fat man, so we’re having a sale!



Hi (first name). 



Santa is loading up the toys at the North Pole

to get ready for Christmas Eve. 



He’s already gotten a head start, but that’s OK. 

We’ve decided to have a sale…



[insert details of offer here]. 



This will make the perfect last-minute Christmas

gift.  And, of course, this will make an awesome gift

you can give yourself. 



[insert details about the offer, along with the

benefits and transformation they’ll get] 



But you have to hurry.  This deal ends at 

[insert deadline].  



Ho ho ho!



[insert name]



P.S. Missing out on this will be like waking up

on Christmas morning with no presents under the tree.  

So don’t be disappointed, [insert call to action…call, 

email, etc.].
